title: T-Cut The Original Restorer, 350ml
features: RESTORES: A truly classic formula, designed to bring back the original colour and lustre of paintwork
REMOVES: oxidation, scratches, ingrained road grime, tar spots and baked on insects
CONTAINS: no silicone and leaves no harmful residues
SUITABLE: for use on many painted surfaces found in the home, caravans, bikes and boats
EASY: Easy to use and apply, If it says T-Cut it works
description: From the manufacturer Shake the bottle well and pour on to a damp microfibre cloth. Working on a small area at a time, apply T-Cut Original Restorer to the surface working in a circular motion. Buff off any excess product with a clean & dry microfibre cloth before the product dries.
